subject: anissa's call
body:
I received a suspicious call from a girl namesd
Anissa,, Ithought I recognized her voice but couldn't
be sure,, she said her friend had brought 2 girls from
Pennsylvania,, and they were leaving,,, it was veru
suspicious.. I told her to call back tomorrow so I
could tape record her conversation.

__________________________________________________
